name: Session reminder - 24h
body: Hey {first_name}, your session with Mimi is tomorrow at {session_time}. Reply STOP to opt out. - Mimi

name: Missed session check-in
when: 2 hours after a missed booked session
body: {first_name}, missed you this morning. All good? Reply with a quick word and we will reschedule for this week. - Mimi

name: Promo - school holiday reset
body: {first_name}, 12 spots opening for the fit-mum reset starting {start_date}. Reply IN if you want one. - Mimi

name: Milestone celebration
body: {first_name} you absolute legend. {milestone_short}. Big proud of you. See you {next_session_day}. - M

name: Payment due - gentle reminder
when: 3 days before auto-debit fails or invoice due date
body: Hey {first_name}, just a gentle heads up your {month_name} payment is due {due_date}. {amount_label}. If something is up, message me. - Mimi
